title: Ember Disc
description: Just a datapack that add new music disc composed by Ember7
body:
Have you ever feel that there are not enough minecraft music disc? Anyways this pack is there and adds many new dics composed by Ember7!

To give the disc in creative use:

```
/function ember_disc:give/<disc_name>
```

### Disc and optention:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- 8-Bit Matrix (Loot from creepers killed by skeletons)
- Perfect Facade (Loot from creepers killed by skeletons)
- Derelict Radion (Craft from resin)
- Beautiful Tears (Found in suspicious gravel from cold ocean ruins)
- Mechanical Amalgation (Found in fortress loot chest)
- A Time Before (Traded from piglins)
- Golden Fethers (Found in end city loot chest)

**Same order as the galery image*

</details>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/XvzMkyXa22g" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Songs Credits: [Ember7](https://youtube.com/@ember7.7)
